---
title: "Gapminder Website"
---

The Gapminder dataset contains life expectancy, GDP per capita, and population data for 142 countries from 1952 to 2007 in 5-year intervals.

## Pages
- [Life Expectancy and GDP per Capita](life-gdp.qmd)
- [Life Expectancy and Population](life-population.qmd)
- [Country Analysis](country.qmd)
